209.reason: The keyword "for" is missing from the TK map, so it is incorrectly recognized as IDENFR instead of FORTK.

240.reason: [Error: No bounds check before accessing rawCode.charAt(pos) after incrementing pos. If pos equals rawCode.length(), this will throw StringIndexOutOfBoundsException, causing the program to crash.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: No bounds check before accessing rawCode.charAt(pos) after incrementing pos. If pos equals rawCode.length(), this will throw StringIndexOutOfBoundsException, causing the program to crash.]
